column2: Assessor Cannot Set Defensible BVLOS Requirements with Invalid/Incomplete Swarm-Aware SORA Evidence
column3: ['Provide the assessor with access to a UAS operational authorization application for BVLOS operations. ', 'Give the assessor invalid or incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'Verify that the assessor cannot set BVLOS requirements based on the provided evidence. ']
column4: ['The assessor has access to the required application. ', 'The assessor receives invalid or incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'The assessor is unable to set defensible BVLOS requirements when using the given invalid/incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence. ']
